transcript.text:
(Today's food endlessly filling the trays)
(Every kind of cuts gathered together, the special cuts of chicken)
(Insane appearance) Wow, the appearance is amazing
(The appetizing sound of coal burning...!)
(First Round) Thanks
(Second Round) Thanks
(Third Round) Thanks
(Fourth Round) Wow! Thanks
(Fifth Round) Thanks
(Sixth Round) Thank you very much
(Endless marathon of charcoal-grilled chicken)
(Into the bag)
(The mukbang of grilled chicken worth saving, it's starting)
(Samgakji Station, Yongsan-gu, Seoul)
Hi, everyone
I came here to Samgakji

(Charcoal grilled chicken?!) I'm here to have some charcoal-grilled chicken
I came here when the restaurant first opened,
and I enjoyed their chicken very much
(Now a must-visit restaurant in Samgakji!) People are even lining up to get in here these days
(The lined-up chairs sure prove their popularity...) The chairs are lined up outside... the waiting line must be long here
(The restaurant is busy even before dinner time) I avoided the dinner time rush, but it's already pretty busy
(The must-visit place in Samgakji) Ta-da! The place is called 'Ddukbang Grilled Chicken'
(Let's go to the basement) I'm headed to the basement with fewer customers
Let's see
I had assorted grilled chicken last time
(The grilled chicken looks special even at a glance) Was it this...? Is this the specially assorted grilled chicken?
- Is this the specially assorted grilled chicken? - Yes! That's the one
Oh, it's this
The specially assorted grilled chicken is for maybe 2 or 3 people
Umm... I'll get 4 of these
Which soup is popular?

- The soy bean paste soup is popular - Then, I'll have that one
(Order is placed including a Coke!) I'll have a Coke too
(Various cuts and flavors complete...)
(the specially assorted grilled chicken)
(The charcoal that's in charge of grilling is put in its place!)
(The foods are served) Thank you!
Thanks
Thank you very much
Look at them... wow, the appearance is insane
There are skewers too
(Various special cuts are included) There are chicken ribs, hearts, and gizzards
(Explaining the cuts)
(Pause for the information / The map of grilled chicken)
(Thighs / hearts / spicy marinated chicken / chicken marinated in soy sauce gizzards / wings / shiitake meatballs / necks)
- I'll put a cut with some meat on the grill - Okay!
(Various cuts for various tastes)

Wow, it looks so delicious
What is this, here?
(Shiitake wasabi sauce / garlic pepper paste sauce / garlic mayo sauce) It's shiitake pickled in wasabi
(Assistance for her to finish the meal before customers rush in) I'll grill the chicken for you
- Please, enjoy! - Oh, thanks!
(Moved) I'm so thankful that she offered to grill the chicken
Thanks for the food!
I enjoyed it so much the last time I came here
This is the neck of the chicken!
It's grilled so well, isn't it?
With the first piece,
I'll dip it lightly in salt
Wow! Their chicken has gotten even better!
The meat...
you know how the neck has bones in it, so it's pretty crunchy
The skin on the outside

is tender and chewable
It has a tender and chewable texture
It's so good
(Good!)
This is the gizzard
They prepared the gizzard
pressed thinly,
and cut it nicely
So good
Let me try the heart!
I'll try the charcoal-grilled chicken too!
It looks like it's done
Let me try it
It's a chicken thigh!
Get some wasabi on it
I'll dip it in salt lightly

Just as I expected,
(Delicious thighs) the thighs are so good
Other cuts are so great too
They all taste so good,
(The thighs are the most importantly delicious...lol) but the thighs are especially good
(Taken to the table next to her to be grilled) Oh! Thank you!
(Thank you for your assistance for the smooth filming session...!)
I'll put some wasabi on top of it
Well, wasabi usually goes well with greasy cuts,
but their chicken is so juicy,
so the wasabi
goes well with it, and is not spicy at all
There's white kimchi too
The chicken is so delicious
(She's almost done...)
(Immediate supply) Wow! Oh, thanks

- Thank you very much! - Sure
(Foods are being supplied at a very fast rate) She grilled them so fast! Amazing!
(So grateful...)
(The angelic chef is grilling the chicken with her own hands)
Wow, this is the heart that I love so much
(You like hearts, huh?)
(More hearts are served) Wow! Oh, thank you
(Try these deliciously grilled hearts)
Wow, thank you very much
I'll clear the hearts first
(The GOAT)
To be honest...
I like beef the most, and pork next
Chicken actually comes last...
(However, charcoal-grilled chicken is a different matter) But, I love charcoal grilled chicken so much
I'll cut this one in half

It's shaped round like Korean pancakes
Oh, the texture is clearly so great
(Skewering technique)
(Wings are served!) Oh, really? Wow, thanks!
I heard tomatoes
are great when it's cooked...
So delicious!
She grilled the wings,
but I've never tried grilled wings before
(Glossing with juice)
The skin is
grilled very well to be so crispy
It's so good
It's crispy and chewy
Mmm... so delicious!
The fire is pretty strong here...!

(That burnt them all)
No! Don't burn!
(Headache)
(I'll cut the burnt parts off) I can eat them!
It tastes like well-cooked potatoes that smell like garlic
(Continuously absorbing the wings)
A tray of chicken has a bigger portion than I thought
(Endless supply) Mmm, I love it!
(How should I express my gratitude...) Thank you very much for your effort...
(Swift grilling)
Thank you very much
Wow, these go so well with the chicken
Let me try the gizzards first
They used to be called poop sacks,
so I believed it stored poop...
(I thought it was really for storing poop)

(It's actually delicious...) If you don't like it because you think the same way I did, it doesn't actually store poop
(Burnt like lavers) Oh, no!
(The second round is being cleared at the speed of light)
(Infinite supply) Wow!
Thank you very much
I'll grill the marinated ones this time
(Marinated chicken that made my heart flutter...) Oh, thank you very much
They usually grill only the first tray for customers,
but they're grilling all so that I can leave quickly before the rush...
Thank you
(Marinated chicken is being grilled deliciously on the side)
I think the neck is so delicious
This neck is great
(Deboning...)
(Into the bag?)
LOLOLOL

(Who am I trying to bring it to...?) What am I doing...? Why did I try to put it in the bag?
I'll put some salt on it
(Soy sauce marinated chicken)
(So helpful all the way to the end...) Wow, thank you very much
She grilled the chicken marinated with soy sauce
They look so delicious
Do you see the meat on this thing?
That's insane
(Moved)
Wow, it's so tender,
and the soy sauce marinade
is deliciously savory
It's so good
(It raises anticipation for the chili paste marinade chicken) I remember chili paste marinade chicken was better than the soy sauce one
I'll have it with some shredded radishes
Wow, the chili paste(?) is

The sauce(?) is
Oh, the soy sauce marinade!
(The delicious taste drove her to be forgetful) It has so much marinade on the meat!
(Soy paste soup that I forgot about is finally served...!) Wow, thank you!
It's unique
that this soy paste soup has fish cake in it
(Grilling the rest of the salted chicken instead of the marinated one!) Wow, it looks so delicious!
The soup looks like it's cooked with organic soy paste
(Put on wings for absorbing food thanks to the soup)
Shall I make another chicken skewer?
(A real skewer) It's a chicken skewer!
This really looks like a legit one!
(The big meal size that induces laughter)
It's been portions for 13 people...
(The angelic chef was worried she couldn't keep up with the speed of Tzuyang)
(Salted chicken for the last round) Wow, thank you!

- I made skewers for you, I hope you enjoy them - Wow, you made skewers... amazing!
(She made skewers just like Tzuyang) Thank you...
I'll grill the rest!
I can't thank you enough...
(Thank you for your effort!) I enjoyed the meal all thanks to you
(By the time the salted chicken is done...)
(Replacing the grill) Thank you
I'll grill the marinated chicken on it
They look so delicious! I'll start grilling them
(Putting the chicken on the grill...)
(Ready to grill) The heat died down, so it's perfect for grilling
(The marinated ones are pre-grilled)
I was looking forward to trying these
(It reminds me of the memory of enjoying them...) I enjoyed the chili paste marinated chicken last time
It's like an ace in the hole...
(The chili paste marinated chicken is perfect for the last course)

The spicy taste of the red pepper paste
is better than soy sauce marinade
This is very sweet and spicy
It's swicy
(Replacing the grill) Thank you
It'd go well with the white kimchi
(Spicy) Wow, so spicy!
I think the shredded daikons would be good too, even if it's spicy
(The spiciness that disarms the anti-chilihead)
- The garlic mayo sauce makes it less spicy - Oh, really?
Wow, thank you!
(Forgot about the sauces since they're good as they are)
It goes perfectly together...
I'll scrape the sauce,
(Last bite) and finish my last bite
(Grilled chicken cleared)

She actually finished all, lol
(I could enjoy the meal thanks to the kind staff)
She even drank cans of Coke
Is she okay to have a big meal with regular Coke, not Coke Zero?
They don't serve only one cut of chicken,
but they serve
six different cuts,
which are various and unique
Each cut had a different texture,
so the chicken was so fun to have
Thanks for another great meal!
